title: DETERMINATION OF THE QUANTITATIVE COMPOSITION OF THE COMPLEX FORMED BY COPPER (II) WITH ACYCLOVIR BY THE SEM-EDT ANALYSIS METHOD.
author: Botir Muratov, Khayit To'raev, Ibragim Umbarov, Sherzod Kasimov
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: In this article, the quantitative composition of the complex formed by copper(II) with acyclovir was studied by the SEM-EDT analysis method.
steps_raw: In this article, the quantitative composition of the complex formed by copper(II) with acyclovir was studied by the SEM-EDT analysis method.
